creator: ingo.petersen.web@freenet.de
text:
Hello,

thanks for your respose!

You=B4re totally right, with the correct prefix it works flawlssly.
Maybe ist possible to give a warnig while installing, or=20
the Programm shouldn=B4t be installed to LOCALBASE,=20
because in this case it normally doesn=B4t make much sense
and if you have a uncommon partition sheme you can then choose another
directory.
Since the most people use the standard sheme i thought=20
the package should be build in a way that it always works.
And even if they don=B4t, nut will never work if its not in
the root directory, because it always wants to write data back
to a partition which is already unmounted, i guess.


regards

Ingo=0A=0A=0A=0A"Jetzt Handykosten senken mit klarmobil - 14 Ct./Min.! Hier=
 klicken"=0Ahttp://www.klarmobil.de/index.html?pid=3D73025=0A
